label: Kitchen Cabinetry
heading: Kitchen Cabinets
intro: Factory-direct kitchen cabinetry in four distinct series — each offering a unique aesthetic with consistent quality, KCMA certification, and 2-week local delivery from our Aurora warehouse.

series.name: Classic Series
series.desc: As the versatile foundation of kitchen design, classic cabinetry avoids unnecessary frills to prioritize stylistic harmony. This minimalist approach grants you the freedom to infuse your own personality through an endless array of complementary design elements.

series.name: Delight Series
series.desc: Our signature 5-sides MDF shaker doors with 3/4" frame and 3/8" MDF core. Painted finishes on exterior and all edges. Crack-resistant.

series.name: Grand Series
series.desc: More choices from AGT colours are available now. Scant 3/4 inch thick MDF board, with PET laminate on the exterior and melamine laminate on the interior, ABS banding of matching colour on all edges.

series.name: Luxury Series
series.desc: You don't want to miss the brand new luxury series. Constructed with a solid 3/4" thickness. The door is built for strength and stability, with a solid feel that pairs clean design with long-lasting performance.
